description: Shared Renovate preset for Feld Hugo-on-Vercel sites. Auto-bumps the pinned Hugo (hugo-extended) and the hugo-common submodule; smoke-gated automerge for minor/patch.

packageRules.description: Hugo minor/patch: automerge once the smoke check passes
Hugo major: open the PR but require a human look (breaking-change risk)
hugo-common submodule: automerge once the smoke check passes
